prompt: Breathtaking aurora borealis dancing across an Arctic sky in real-time, vivid green and purple curtains of light rippling and folding above a snow-covered Scandinavian landscape. Low-angle wide shot from a frozen lake reflecting the aurora, stars visible through gaps in the display, time-lapse clouds drifting at the horizon, deep teal shadows on the snow.
winner_reason: Highest quality (94) with exceptional aurora dynamics
